zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Cave於1391年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁諾斯 凱夫時，他的父親Sir Alexander Cave21歲，母親Catherine de Sommerville21歲。他於1409年與Anne Ingleby在英國英格蘭哈普爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1420年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃享年29歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in East Yorkshire called Cave, apparently from a river name derived from Old English cāf ‘swift’.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Norman and Picard Old French cauf (from Latin calvus) ‘bald’.
French: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a cave, from Old French cave ‘cave’, ‘cellar’ (from Latin cavea, a derivative of cavus ‘hollow’).

variants.name: Cavin
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): variant of Caveen, a shortened form of Manx Mac Dhaimhín, son of Daimhín. The personal name is a diminutive of Gaelic damh ‘bard, poet’.

variants.name: Caves
meanings: English: variant of Cave , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Keeve
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Cave  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chaffee
meanings: English (of Norman origin): descriptive nickname from a derivative of Old French chauf ‘bald’ (from Latin calvus). Compare Cave .

variants.name: Cavett
meanings: Scottish (of French origin): altered form of French Cavet, which is either a diminutive of Cave 3 or a metonymic occupational name for a laborer, one who used a cavet, an Old Occitan word for a tool for clearing ground for cultivation.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Cave was born in 1391, in North Cave, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Alexander Cave, was 21 and his mother, Catherine de Sommerville, was 21. He married Anne Ingleby in 1409, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1420, in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29.

ko.North Cave, East Riding of Yorkshire Uni: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 노르스 카브
ko.lifeSummary: Peter Cave(이)가 1391년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 노르스 카브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander Cave(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine de Sommerville(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 Anne Ingleby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Cave родился в 1391 г. в местности норт кав, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander Cave было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Sommerville, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Ingleby в 1409 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1420 г. в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter Cave nació en 1391, en North Cave, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Alexander Cave, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Catherine de Sommerville, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Anne Ingleby en 1409, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1420, en Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años.
